title: gnutls security, bug fix, and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.8.9-9.14]
- key_update: rework the rekeying logic (RHEL-107498)
- Fix CVE-2025-6395, CVE-2025-32988, CVE-2025-32989, CVE-2025-32990
full_text:
[3.8.9-9.14]
- key_update: rework the rekeying logic (RHEL-107498)
- Fix CVE-2025-6395, CVE-2025-32988, CVE-2025-32989, CVE-2025-32990
